title: El medallón del crimen (El 13 de oro)
actors: Rosario Granados, Manolo Fábregas, Rita Macedo
plot: This crime drama from 1956 is a genuine Mexican Noir. Raul, a married businessman who has a loving wife and son decides to go out drinking with some friends for a big night on the town. He encounters a woman in a bar who is wearin...
